name: CB Financial Services, Inc.
business: CB Financial Services, Inc. is a bank holding company that operates primarily through its wholly owned subsidiary, Community Bank, a Pennsylvania-chartered commercial bank. Community Bank offers residential and commercial real estate loans, commercial and industrial loans, consumer loans, and various deposit products to individuals and businesses in its market area of southwestern Pennsylvania and West Virginia.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in southwestern Pennsylvania and West Virginia

exposures.sentence: Our risk management program is designed to identify, assess and mitigate risks across our company. When considering financial, operational, regulatory, reputational and legal risk, our program is well matched for our size and complexity. Our Chief Information Security Officer, in conjunction with the Chief Operating Officer, is currently responsible for managing our information security program.
The market area has been impacted by the energy industry through the extraction of untapped natural gas reserves in the Marcellus Shale and Utica Shale Formations.
